summary: Implementation review accepts Harbor local identity environment management for #203/#204/#205/#206/#207.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-204 --json` passed locally.
follow_ups: Future protected payload custody should add encrypted local storage or OS keychain integration; this PR stores and exposes refs/status only.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation introduces local identity environment refs, login/storage status, provider binding, and redacted public output without claiming risk bypass or touching real site actions.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Runtime API tests and smoke coverage cover create/import/update/list/delete, managed session open, sensitive input rejection, provider binding, and public redaction boundaries.
